description_long: This is a tall, conical cup with a wide opening and a narrower base, featuring a striking black-and-white illustrated design. The exterior is adorned with intricate, hand-drawn patterns including waves, tentacles, clouds, and abstract geometric shapes, giving it a whimsical, artistic appearance. The artwork wraps continuously around the cup, with some areas depicting cartoonish faces and a playful cityscape. The cup appears to be made of a smooth, hard material, likely ceramic or plastic, with a matte or slightly glossy finish. There are no visible handles or lids, and the interior is plain and light-colored. The cup is visually engaging and would stand out in an urban environment due to its unique, graphic art style.
description: A tall, conical cup with black-and-white illustrated patterns of waves, tentacles, and abstract shapes, made of smooth, hard material.
description_view_0: This view highlights a tentacle motif rising from the base, with clouds and a cityscape in the background.
description_view_1: This side shows more abstract geometric patterns and a partial cartoon face, with the tentacle motif continuing.
description_view_2: Here, the cup displays a large cartoon face and more abstract lines, with less of the tentacle visible.
description_view_3: This view features a continuation of the cityscape and cloud motifs, with the tentacle motif partially visible.
